title: Semantic Brand Triptych Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Semantic Brand Triptych Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-motion semantic brand triptych editorial for GAIA MOTION, translating organic wellness-tech brand with kinetic, earth-forward energy into color, typography, props, and movement. Subject: GAIA MOTION is expressed through portrait close-up, symbolic object lift, full-body kinetic action panel, with the brand object transparent seed-like wearable device held above the head acting as the central semantic prop. Scene: A horizontal image divided into three vertical editorial panels: portrait close-up, symbolic object lift or product moment, and full-body kinetic action, all tied to the brand identity. Composition: Triptych layout with clean panel dividers, bold wordmark inside a geometric frame, high-contrast typography, micro-text slogans, and motion cues connecting all three panels. Signature Elements: Preserved semantic brand triptych editorial source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Senior art-director brand editorial with semantic color psychology, fashion-ad energy, precise typography, dynamic props, polished campaign photography, and visually strategic brand storytelling. Color Palette: Triadic palette rooted in organic wellness-tech brand with kinetic, earth-forward energy: background mood color, high-contrast energy color for typography and accents, and apparel statement color completing the brand system. Lighting: Commercial editorial lighting with sharp panel separation, controlled motion blur, graphic shadows, and consistent brand color atmosphere across panels. Typography: MOVE WITH THE EARTH / BUILD THE RHYTHM / LIGHTER EVERY DAY appears as 2-3 short punchy slogans or keywords, plus a bold GAIA MOTION wordmark that stays legible in the panel system. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Semantic Brand Triptych Editorial Gaia Motion

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-motion semantic brand triptych editorial for FUSE ATLAS, translating brutalist travel-tech brand with neon amber navigation energy into color, typography, props, and movement. Subject: FUSE ATLAS is expressed through wind-lit portrait, glowing compass module, sprinting city-crossing action panel, with the brand object amber glass compass device with projected map rings acting as the central semantic prop. Scene: A horizontal image divided into three vertical editorial panels: portrait close-up, symbolic object lift or product moment, and full-body kinetic action, all tied to the brand identity. Composition: Triptych layout with clean panel dividers, bold wordmark inside a geometric frame, high-contrast typography, micro-text slogans, and motion cues connecting all three panels. Signature Elements: Preserved semantic brand triptych editorial source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Senior art-director brand editorial with semantic color psychology, fashion-ad energy, precise typography, dynamic props, polished campaign photography, and visually strategic brand storytelling. Color Palette: Triadic palette rooted in brutalist travel-tech brand with neon amber navigation energy: background mood color, high-contrast energy color for typography and accents, and apparel statement color completing the brand system. Lighting: Commercial editorial lighting with sharp panel separation, controlled motion blur, graphic shadows, and consistent brand color atmosphere across panels. Typography: FIND THE SIGNAL / MOVE THROUGH FIRE / CITY TO SKY appears as 2-3 short punchy slogans or keywords, plus a bold FUSE ATLAS wordmark that stays legible in the panel system. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
